message:
feat(tui): implement full plan execution pipeline with preview

Main execution pipeline (main.rs):
- Add complete execute action handler with dry_run/shadow mode support
- Call execute_plan_actions() for real execution when not in test modes
- Write outcomes via write_outcomes_for_mode() or write_outcomes_from_execution()
- Update session state to Executing → Completed/Failed based on results
- Display execution summary: attempted/succeeded/failed/skipped counts
- Apply plan preview to process table before execution

Process table enhancements (process_table.rs):
- Add plan_preview field to ProcessRow for staged action display
- Implement apply_plan_preview(plan) to populate preview from Plan
- Add build_plan_preview() helper generating formatted action lines:
  - Stage number, action label, confidence rating
  - Blocked/routing annotations
  - Pre-check conditions
- Import Plan, PlanAction, ActionConfidence, PreCheck types

App/widget updates (app.rs, process_detail.rs):
- request_redraw() call after plan preview application
- Minor detail widget adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
